name: Harnesson
summary: Visual AI Coding Management Platform - an AI agent-based visual coding management platform with project management, AI agent sessions, spec/graph visualization, and Git integration.
goals: Provide a unified platform for managing coding projects with AI assistance
Enable real-time collaboration with Claude Code agents through streaming chat
Visualize project specifications as interactive graphs and documents

acceptanceCriteria.then: The main layout with sidebar, topbar, and content area is displayed
